# Distribution Outputs

Generated by the agent-prompt-dkb pipeline.

## Directories
- `claude-code/` — Claude Code plugin format exports
- `skill-md/` — SKILL.md standard format exports  
- `releases/` — Versioned release snapshots

## Generation
Run the full pipeline:
```bash
python scripts/import_from_store.py
python scripts/curate.py
python scripts/export_claude_code.py
python scripts/export_skill_md.py
python scripts/release.py
```
